markdown:
#  Create an hh2 Service Account in Sage 100 Contractor® 
##  Background 
A _service account_ is a special user account that is created in the Sage 100 Contractor® system. This account is required by the hh2 Cloud Service ([www.hh2.com](http://www.hh2.com)) to give the hh2 synchronization client the ability to sync the data in your Sage 100 Contractor® database with the hh2 Cloud Service. This account also permits the hh2 Cloud Service to sync the hh2 data with Procore.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permission** :
    * Permission to create new user accounts in your company's Sage 100 Contractor® database.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * The service account must be granted _Application Admin_ and _Security Admin_ access permission to your Windows-based Sage 100 Contractor® server.
    * The Sage 100 Contractor® server should be running on a Windows server or standalone computer, and NOT a workstation.
    * For best results, perform these steps either at the server or from a location with remote access to your server.


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your Sage 100 Contractor® server.
  2. Create a new user account to act as the "service account" (e.g., create an account named 'hh2Admin'). For instructions, refer to the User Guide for your version of Sage 100 Contractor®.   
**_Important!_** Do NOT use a Windows user account.
  3. Configure the new service account as follows:
     * Add the account to the _Application Admin_ and _Security Admin_ groups.
     * Mark the ‘Password Never Expires’ option for the account's password.   
_Note_ : Next, your Procore point of contact will work with you to install and configure the hh2 synchronization client on the system running your Sage 100 Contractor® database. 


## See Also
  * [Perform an On-Demand Sync with Sage 100 Contractor®](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/sage-100/tutorials/perform-an-on-demand-sync-with-sage-100)
  * [Sage 100 Contractor® - Things to Know](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/sage-100/things-to-know)
  * [How often can I sync data between Sage 100 Contractor and Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-often-can-i-sync-data-between-sage-100-contractor-and-procore)
title: Create an hh2 Service Account in Sage 100 Contractor®
description: How to create a service account in your Sage 100 system to be used by the hh2 Cloud Service to securely synchronize your Sage database with hh2.
